cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiIn.title: DDI-CDI Individual
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiIn.description: DDI-CDI Individual agent (cls-Individual, extends Agent). Represents a person with name, contact information, and identification.

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiMa.title: DDI-CDI Machine
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiMa.description: DDI-CDI Machine agent (cls-Machine, extends Agent). Represents software or hardware with access location, function, and interface specifications.

cdi:accessLocation.description: Network or physical access point for this machine

cdi:ownerOperatorContact.description: Contact information for the owner or operator

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiOr.title: DDI-CDI Organization
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiOr.description: DDI-CDI Organization agent (cls-Organization, extends Agent). Represents a group or institution with structured name, contact information, and identification.

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiPr.title: DDI-CDI ProcessingAgent
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiPr.description: DDI-CDI ProcessingAgent (cls-ProcessingAgent, extends Agent). Orchestrates production activities, linking agents to the activities they perform and environments they operate on.

@id.description: Identifier for this processing agent node

cdi:performs.description: Activities this agent performs (cdi:Activity). Use @id references to Activity nodes defined elsewhere in the graph.

cdi:operatesOn.description: Production environments this agent operates on (cdi:ProductionEnvironment)

cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent

cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiDa.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdif.bbr.metadata.ddiProperties.ddicdiDa.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

id-reference.description: JSON-LD @id reference to a node defined elsewhere in the graph

@id.description: IRI or blank node identifier of the referenced node

cdi:context.description: Context or usage of this name
Context or usage of this name

cdi:effectiveDates.description: Date range when this name is/was effective

cdi:isFormal.description: Whether this is the formal/legal name

cdi:typeOfOrganizationName.description: Classification of this name (e.g. legal, trade, acronym)

cdi:fullName.description: Full name as a single internationalized string

cdi:isFormal.description: Whether this is a formal name

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred name

cdi:effectiveDates.description: Date range when this name is/was effective

cdi:context.description: Context or usage of this name

cdi:typeOfIndividualName.description: Classification of this name (e.g. birth, married, pen)

cdi:sex.description: Sex specification associated with this name

cdi:languageSpecificString.description: The label text with language tag

cdi:typeOfAddress.description: Type of address (e.g. home, work, mailing)

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred address
Whether this is the preferred email

cdi:typeOfTelephone.description: Type of telephone (e.g. mobile, office, fax)

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred telephone
Whether this is the preferred website

cdi:typeOfService.description: Type of messaging service (e.g. Slack, Teams)

cdi:isPreferred.description: Whether this is the preferred messaging service

AccessLocation.description: DDI-CDI access location for a machine (dt-AccessLocation)

cdi:mimeType.description: MIME type of the resource at this location

cdi:effectiveDates.description: Date range when this image is effective

cdi:language.description: ISO language code (e.g. en, fr, de)

title: DDI-CDI Agent
description: DDI-CDI Agent class hierarchy. Covers Individual (person), Machine (software/hardware), Organization (group/institution), and ProcessingAgent (orchestrates production activities) using DDI Cross-Domain Integration vocabulary. Each agent subtype is defined in its own building block; this schema composes them.

anyOf.description: Unwrapped @graph array of agent nodes (OGC pipeline)
